FROM "allTeams" t 
JOIN "allTrustControls" c ON t."category" = c."category" 
WHERE c."category" ILIKE 'Data Security' 
AND (t."role" ILIKE '%security%' OR t."searchText" ILIKE '%incident%' OR c."searchText" ILIKE '%incident%');
